reviews.review_description:
Muffin Fight is a fast-paced, arena-style cooking game where you gather ingredients, bake muffins, and launch them at your enemies in chaotic, fun-filled battles. There’s no complex storyline or drawn-out cutscenes—just pure, arcade-style action at its best.

What I love most is that each muffin combination becomes a unique weapon, with my personal favorite being the cherry muffin bomb. It’s a perfect burst of fun that’s both exciting solo and even better with friends.

For just $2, it’s a total steal. If you're looking for a unique, addictive multiplayer game that will keep you coming back, this is a must-play.
Great chaotic multiplayer experience! Love crafting your own projectiles with different ingredients

reviews.review_title: I cannot move when I get to the lobby...
reviews.review_description: Can you please add a walk or teleport feature? I am just stuck in the lobby and cannot go anywhere.

developer_response.body: Hi, in case it helps, you can teleport around by pushing in on the thumbstick!
